message:
feat(tui): semantic color rebalance — add state helpers and adopt across screens

Adds text_accent, text_error, text_success, text_warning, text_critical,
text_facet_label, text_facet_active, text_action_key, and
style_for_anomaly_severity to tui_theme.rs.  Replaces 20+ direct palette
accesses across 8 screen files with semantic helpers for consistent
emphasis hierarchy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
